channel.title: AZ on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in AZ on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Arizona Department of Corrections (AZ)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Arizona Department of Corrections.

Model: JEM Signed: June 16, 2020 County: State: AZ FIPS: unresolved

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.

item.title: AKIMA GLOBAL SERVICES, LLC — ICE PINAL, AZ $33,247,209
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: AKIMA GLOBAL SERVICES, LLC Award ID: 70CDCR22FR0000056 Amount: $33,247,208.53 Description: GUARD, FOOD, AND TRANSPORTATION SERVICES FOR FLORENCE SERVICE PROCESSING CENTER Period: 2022-09-30 to 2023-09-29 Location: PINAL, AZ (FIPS: 04021)

item.title: AKIMA GLOBAL SERVICES, LLC — ICE PINAL, AZ $35,424,263
item.description:
ICE contract.

item.title: CSI AVIATION, INC — ICE MARICOPA, AZ $324,216,616
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CSI AVIATION, INC Award ID: 70CDCR24FR0000024 Amount: $324,216,615.92 Description: INTERIM CONTRACT FOR DAILY CHARTER FLIGHTS Period: 2024-04-04 to 2025-02-28 Location: MARICOPA, AZ (FIPS: 04013)

item.title: CSI AVIATION, INC — ICE MARICOPA, AZ $562,049,742
item.description:
ICE contract.

Recipient: CSI AVIATION, INC Award ID: 70CDCR25FR0000022 Amount: $562,049,742.00 Description: THE PURPOSE OF THIS TASK ORDER IS TO PROVIDE DAILY SCHEDULED LARGE AIRCRAFT & SPECIAL HIGH RISK CHARTER FLIGHTS TO FACILITATE ICE’S ENFORCEMENT AND REMOVAL OPERATIONS OF ILLEGAL ALIENS. Period: 2025-03-01 to 2025-11-30 Location: MARICOPA, AZ (FIPS: 04013)

item.title: Navajo County, AZ — USDA Distress Profile (4 indicators)
item.description:
USDA Economic Research Service county typology flags Navajo County, AZ with 4 distress indicators:

government/corrections-dependent economy; persistent poverty (20%+ poverty rate for 30+ years); low employment ratio; housing stress

Full flags: Government, Housing Stress, Low Employment, Persistent Poverty

This county already has an IGSA detention facility. The combination of existing federal detention relationship + economic distress = high vulnerability to expansion pitch.

Nonmetro: nonmetro

Source: USDA ERS County Typology Codes, 2025 edition
